tools.Name: Claude Code
tools.Description: An advanced AI agent for coding, capable of orchestrating subagents, using memory, running hooks, and integrating with MCP servers.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex coding tasks like code review, documentation generation, and CI/CD pipelines.

tools.Name: VibeVoice
tools.Description: An open-source voice AI framework supporting long-form speech recognition (ASR) and real-time streaming text-to-speech (TTS).
tools.Use_Case: Generating structured transcriptions for hour-long audio or streaming real-time speech.

tools.Name: PaddleOCR
tools.Description: A robust, industry-leading OCR toolkit that converts PDFs and images into structured LLM-ready data (JSON/Markdown).
tools.Use_Case: Parsing complex documents, tables, and images for RAG and agentic data pipelines.
